feedback.text: Hi! I am writing to request the expansion of the Digital Fairness Act to include preventing publishers from remotely destroying video games (as in, completely preventing customers from interacting with them at all, even though they purchased it. There has already been several cases of this occurring, the most notable example being "The Crew", which is now completely unplayable). More than a million EU citizens have already shown interest in this by signing the currently ongoing "Stop Destroying Videogames" European Citizens' Iniative.
